title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 at predicting protein structures and drug properties, enabling applications in toxicity prediction, drug repurposing, and antibody design.
